title: 大人のデートはサプライズ？

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it isn't Mayano. Are you perhaps waiting for
someone?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Fuji! You gotta hear this!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
So you had movie plans with Akebono, but she
was forced to cancel due to a sudden errand...
Does that mean you'll go alone?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
No way... I wanted to watch it together with her.
Besides, I already missed the screening...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't look so glum. If you're not against the
idea, how about I join you today?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? You'll play with me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Why, I'll take you on an exciting day
filled with whimsy!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: All right! Okay, sooo today, I wanna...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whooa! Look at those gloves, Fuji! They look so
grown-up! I want them, I want them!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They do look lovely... But I believe I can warm up
your hands just fine myself.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Is that childish of me to grow jealous over a
pair of gloves? Hehe, just kidding.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(Whoa whoa whoa! Hold it! This must be one of
those romantic grown-up dates! Fuji's amazing...)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I do enjoy looking at the sea, but nothing
compares to seeing your face gaze down at the
ocean creatures.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm so weak, aren't I? How the solemn look
in your eyes steals away my heart. I have to be
careful.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
From now on, when I look at the sunset, I daresay
your image will come to mind. For instance, the
touch of your hair...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Eeeek?! I can't, I can't! I can't breathe! I'm not
ready to be a grown-up!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, have you had your fill? Hehe, perhaps I
should act more down-to-earth!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Maya, I'm sorry for showing up late! And thanks
for the tickets, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh... Huh?! Bono?! But how? What happened to your errand? And what tickets?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I called her earlier, and coincidentally, her
sudden plans were just about done. I also booked
you two some movie seats.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But when?! How were you able to do it right under my nose? What did you do?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, this was no trick nor illusion! When it
comes to seeing the smiles of my darling ponies, I
can pull off any miracle! ♪
